ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the component */,
  "eol_date" TEXT /* End-of-life date of the component */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., setup, hold, propagation) */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component or parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component or parameter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being revised */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being revised */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_revisions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
